scripts.docker:dev: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d management
scripts.docker:dev:build: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml build management
scripts.docker:dev:logs: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml logs -f management
scripts.build: npm run build -w @renis/database && npm run build -w @renis/management && npm run build -w @renis/widget
